topics.name: Office Practice and Commerce (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Office organization, clerical staff duties, filing systems, correspondence, commerce, and trade.

subtopics.name: Office Organization and Clerical Duties
objectives: Identify administrative departments and duties of a receptionist and clerk
Explain filing systems (alphabetical, numerical, subject) and office equipment

subtopics.name: Commerce and Trade
objectives: Distinguish home trade (wholesale, retail) and foreign trade (import, export)
Describe roles of commercial banks, central bank, insurance, and advertising in trade

topics.name: Bookkeeping and Financial Records (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Source documents, cash book, ledgers, trial balance, and double-entry bookkeeping system.

subtopics.name: Source Documents and Journals
objectives: Identify invoice, receipt, voucher, debit note, and credit note
Record transactions in Sales Journal, Purchases Journal, and Petty Cash Book

subtopics.name: Double-Entry Bookkeeping and Trial Balance
objectives: Apply double-entry bookkeeping principle (debit receiver, credit giver)
Post transactions to ledger accounts and extract a Trial Balance
